title: clinopodium tomentosum
intro: Clinopodium tomentosum, also known as woolly calamint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family. This perennial herb is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and carminative effects. The health benefits of Clinopodium tomentosum include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and indigestion, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Clinopodium tomentosum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
